title: On the Unreasonable Effectiveness of Centroids in Image Retrieval
title_zh: 论质心在图像检索中的不合理有效性
abstract: Image retrieval task consists of finding similar images to a query image from a set of gallery (database) images. Such systems are used in various applications e.g. person re-identification (ReID) or visual product search. Despite active development of retrieval models it still remains a challenging task mainly due to large intra-class variance caused by changes in view angle, lighting, background clutter or occlusion, while inter-class variance may be relatively low. A large portion of current research focuses on creating more robust features and modifying objective functions, usually based on Triplet Loss. Some works experiment with using centroid/proxy representation of a class to alleviate problems with computing speed and hard samples mining used with Triplet Loss. However, these approaches are used for training alone and discarded during the retrieval stage. In this paper we propose to use the mean centroid representation both during training and retrieval. Such an aggregated representation is more robust to outliers and assures more stable features. As each class is represented by a single embedding - the class centroid - both retrieval time and storage requirements are reduced significantly. Aggregating multiple embeddings results in a significant reduction of the search space due to lowering the number of candidate target vectors, which makes the method especially suitable for production deployments. Comprehensive experiments conducted on two ReID and Fashion Retrieval datasets demonstrate effectiveness of our method, which outperforms the current state-of-the-art. We propose centroid training and retrieval as a viable method for both Fashion Retrieval and ReID applications.

abstract_zh: 图像检索任务包括从一组图库（数据库）图像中查找与查询图像相似的图像。此类系统用于各种应用，例如人员重新识别 (ReID) 或视觉产品搜索。尽管检索模型得到了积极的发展，但它仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，主要是由于视角、照明、背景杂乱或遮挡的变化引起的类内方差较大，而类间方差可能相对较低。当前研究的很大一部分集中于创建更鲁棒的特征和修改目标函数，通常基于 Triplet Loss。一些作品尝试使用类的质心/代理表示来缓解计算速度和使用 Triplet Loss 的硬样本挖掘问题。然而，这些方法仅用于训练，并在检索阶段被丢弃。在本文中，我们建议在训练和检索期间使用平均质心表示。这种聚合表示对于异常值更稳健，并确保特征更稳定。由于每个类都由单个嵌入（类质心）表示，因此检索时间和存储要求都显着减少。由于减少了候选目标向量的数量，聚合多个嵌入会导致搜索空间显着减少，这使得该方法特别适合生产部署。对两个 ReID 和时尚检索数据集进行的综合实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法优于当前最先进的方法。我们提出质心训练和检索作为时尚检索和 ReID 应用的可行方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在图像检索任务中使用类别质心表示进行训练和检索，以提升检索效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法依赖Triplet Loss等技术，但面临类内方差大、计算速度慢及难样本挖掘等问题，而质心表示在训练阶段被单独使用，未在检索阶段充分利用。
AI.method: 提出在训练和检索阶段均采用类别均值质心表示，通过聚合多嵌入向量生成单个类质心，降低搜索空间和存储需求，提升特征稳定性。
AI.result: 在两个ReID和时尚检索数据集上的实验表明，该方法在检索性能上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 质心训练与检索方法为图像检索任务提供了高效且实用的解决方案，适用于大规模生产部署场景。

title: Societal Biases in Retrieved Contents: Measurement Framework and Adversarial Mitigation for BERT Rankers
title_zh: 检索内容中的社会偏见：BERT 排名器的测量框架和对抗性缓解
abstract: Societal biases resonate in the retrieved contents of information retrieval (IR) systems, resulting in reinforcing existing stereotypes. Approaching this issue requires established measures of fairness in respect to the representation of various social groups in retrieval results, as well as methods to mitigate such biases, particularly in the light of the advances in deep ranking models. In this work, we first provide a novel framework to measure the fairness in the retrieved text contents of ranking models. Introducing a ranker-agnostic measurement, the framework also enables the disentanglement of the effect on fairness of collection from that of rankers. To mitigate these biases, we propose AdvBert, a ranking model achieved by adapting adversarial bias mitigation for IR, which jointly learns to predict relevance and remove protected attributes. We conduct experiments on two passage retrieval collections (MSMARCO Passage Re-ranking and TREC Deep Learning 2019 Passage Re-ranking), which we extend by fairness annotations of a selected subset of queries regarding gender attributes. Our results on the MSMARCO benchmark show that, (1) all ranking models are less fair in comparison with ranker-agnostic baselines, and (2) the fairness of Bert rankers significantly improves when using the proposed AdvBert models. Lastly, we investigate the trade-off between fairness and utility, showing that we can maintain the significant improvements in fairness without any significant loss in utility.

abstract_zh: 社会偏见在信息检索（IR）系统检索到的内容中产生共鸣，从而强化了现有的刻板印象。解决这个问题需要针对检索结果中不同社会群体的代表性建立公平的衡量标准，以及减轻这种偏见的方法，特别是考虑到深度排名模型的进步。在这项工作中，我们首先提供了一个新颖的框架来衡量排名模型检索的文本内容的公平性。该框架引入了与排名无关的衡量标准，还能够将收集公平性的影响与排名者的影响区分开来。为了减轻这些偏差，我们提出了 AdvBert，这是一种通过适应 IR 的对抗性偏差缓解而实现的排名模型，它共同学习预测相关性并删除受保护的属性。我们对两个段落检索集合（MSMARCO 段落重新排序和 TREC 深度学习 2019 段落重新排序）进行了实验，我们通过对有关性别属性的选定查询子集的公平性注释进行扩展。我们在 MSMARCO 基准上的结果表明，(1) 与排名者无关的基线相比，所有排名模型的公平性较差，(2) 使用所提出的 AdvBert 模型时，Bert 排名者的公平性显着提高。最后，我们研究了公平性和效用之间的权衡，表明我们可以保持公平性的显着改进，而不会造成效用的任何重大损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种测量信息检索系统中社会偏见的新框架，并设计了AdvBert模型通过对抗训练缓解BERT排序器中的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 信息检索系统检索结果中存在社会偏见会强化刻板印象，现有深度排序模型缺乏有效的公平性评估和偏见缓解方法。
AI.method: 构建了与排序器无关的公平性测量框架以分离集合和排序器的影响，提出AdvBert模型通过联合学习相关性预测和受保护属性消除实现对抗偏见缓解。
AI.result: 实验表明所有排序模型相比基线公平性更低，AdvBert在MSMARCO基准上显著提升公平性且不损失效用，验证了公平性与效用的平衡可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架和AdvBert模型有效缓解了检索结果中的社会偏见，为构建更公平的排序系统提供了新思路和方法。

title: Point Cloud Learning with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行点云学习
abstract: Remarkable performance from Transformer networks in Natural Language Processing promote the development of these models in dealing with computer vision tasks such as image recognition and segmentation. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, called Multi-level Multi-scale Point Transformer (MLMSPT) that works directly on the irregular point clouds for representation learning. Specifically, a point pyramid transformer is investigated to model features with diverse resolutions or scales we defined, followed by a multi-level transformer module to aggregate contextual information from different levels of each scale and enhance their interactions. While a multi-scale transformer module is designed to capture the dependencies among representations across different scales. Extensive evaluation on public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the competitive performance of our methods on 3D shape classification, segmentation tasks.
summary: Remarkable performance from Transformer networks in Natural Language Processing promote the development of these models in dealing with computer vision tasks such as image recognition and segmentation. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, called Multi-level Multi-scale Point Transformer (MLMSPT) that works directly on the irregular point clouds for representation learning. Specifically, a point pyramid transformer is investigated to model features with diverse resolutions or scales we defined, followed by a multi-level transformer module to aggregate contextual information from different levels of each scale and enhance their interactions. While a multi-scale transformer module is designed to capture the dependencies among representations across different scales. Extensive evaluation on public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the competitive performance of our methods on 3D shape classification, segmentation tasks.

search_text: Point Cloud Learning with Transformer 使用 Transformer 进行点云学习 Remarkable performance from Transformer networks in Natural Language Processing promote the development of these models in dealing with computer vision tasks such as image recognition and segmentation. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, called Multi-level Multi-scale Point Transformer (MLMSPT) that works directly on the irregular point clouds for representation learning. Specifically, a point pyramid transformer is investigated to model features with diverse resolutions or scales we defined, followed by a multi-level transformer module to aggregate contextual information from different levels of each scale and enhance their interactions. While a multi-scale transformer module is designed to capture the dependencies among representations across different scales. Extensive evaluation on public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the competitive performance of our methods on 3D shape classification, segmentation tasks. authors_text: Raphaël Couturier,Hassan N. Noura,Ola Salman,Abderrahmane Sider
title: A Deep Learning Object Detection Method for an Efficient Clusters Initialization
title_zh: 一种用于高效集群初始化的深度学习对象检测方法
abstract: Clustering is an unsupervised machine learning method grouping data samples into clusters of similar objects. In practice, clustering has been used in numerous applications such as banking customers profiling, document retrieval, image segmentation, and e-commerce recommendation engines. However, the existing clustering techniques present significant limitations, from which is the dependability of their stability on the initialization parameters (e.g. number of clusters, centroids). Different solutions were presented in the literature to overcome this limitation (i.e. internal and external validation metrics). However, these solutions require high computational complexity and memory consumption, especially when dealing with big data. In this paper, we apply the recent object detection Deep Learning (DL) model, named YOLO-v5, to detect the initial clustering parameters such as the number of clusters with their sizes and centroids. Mainly, the proposed solution consists of adding a DL-based initialization phase making the clustering algorithms free of initialization. Two model solutions are provided in this work, one for isolated clusters and the other one for overlapping clusters. The features of the incoming dataset determine which model to use. Moreover, The results show that the proposed solution can provide near-optimal clusters initialization parameters with low computational and resources overhead compared to existing solutions.

abstract_zh: 聚类是一种无监督机器学习方法，将数据样本分组为相似对象的簇。在实践中，集群已被用于许多应用程序，例如银行客户分析、文档检索、图像分割和电子商务推荐引擎。然而，现有的聚类技术存在很大的局限性，其稳定性取决于初始化参数（例如聚类数量、质心）。文献中提出了不同的解决方案来克服这一限制（即内部和外部验证指标）。然而，这些解决方案需要较高的计算复杂度和内存消耗，特别是在处理大数据时。在本文中，我们应用最新的对象检测深度学习（DL）模型（名为 YOLO-v5）来检测初始聚类参数，例如聚类数量及其大小和质心。主要是，所提出的解决方案包括添加基于深度学习的初始化阶段，使聚类算法无需初始化。这项工作提供了两种模型解决方案，一种针对孤立集群，另一种针对重叠集群。传入数据集的特征决定使用哪个模型。此外，结果表明，与现有解决方案相比，所提出的解决方案可以提供接近最优的集群初始化参数，且计算和资源开销较低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习目标检测模型YOLO-v5的聚类初始化方法，用于自动确定聚类数量、大小及质心，以解决传统聚类算法对初始化参数依赖的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法（如K-means）对初始化参数（如聚类数、质心）敏感，且现有优化方案计算复杂度高、内存消耗大，难以适应大数据场景。
AI.method: 采用YOLO-v5模型检测数据集中的初始聚类参数，设计两种模型分别处理孤立聚类和重叠聚类场景，通过深度学习初始化阶段替代人工参数设置。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在保证聚类质量的同时，显著降低计算复杂度和资源消耗，相比现有方案具有更高的效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习驱动聚类初始化方法有效解决了传统算法参数依赖问题，为大规模数据聚类提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: Medical Transformer: Universal Brain Encoder for 3D MRI Analysis
title_zh: Medical Transformer：用于 3D MRI 分析的通用脑编码器
abstract: Transfer learning has gained attention in medical image analysis due to limited annotated 3D medical datasets for training data-driven deep learning models in the real world. Existing 3D-based methods have transferred the pre-trained models to downstream tasks, which achieved promising results with only a small number of training samples. However, they demand a massive amount of parameters to train the model for 3D medical imaging. In this work, we propose a novel transfer learning framework, called Medical Transformer, that effectively models 3D volumetric images in the form of a sequence of 2D image slices. To make a high-level representation in 3D-form empowering spatial relations better, we take a multi-view approach that leverages plenty of information from the three planes of 3D volume, while providing parameter-efficient training. For building a source model generally applicable to various tasks, we pre-train the model in a self-supervised learning manner for masked encoding vector prediction as a proxy task, using a large-scale normal, healthy brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) dataset. Our pre-trained model is evaluated on three downstream tasks: (i) brain disease diagnosis, (ii) brain age prediction, and (iii) brain tumor segmentation, which are actively studied in brain MRI research. The experimental results show that our Medical Transformer outperforms the state-of-the-art transfer learning methods, efficiently reducing the number of parameters up to about 92% for classification and

abstract_zh: 由于现实世界中用于训练数据驱动的深度学习模型的带注释 3D 医学数据集有限，迁移学习在医学图像分析中受到了关注。现有的基于 3D 的方法已将预训练的模型转移到下游任务中，仅用少量的训练样本就取得了可喜的结果。然而，他们需要大量参数来训练 3D 医学成像模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，称为 Medical Transformer，它可以有效地以 2D 图像切片序列的形式对 3D 体积图像进行建模。为了更好地以 3D 形式进行高级表示，增强空间关系，我们采用多视图方法，利用来自 3D 体积三个平面的大量信息，同时提供参数高效的训练。为了构建普遍适用于各种任务的源模型，我们使用大规模正常、健康的大脑磁共振成像（MRI）数据集，以自监督学习的方式对模型进行预训练，以掩蔽编码向量预测作为代理任务。我们的预训练模型针对三个下游任务进行评估：(i) 脑疾病诊断、(ii) 脑年龄预测和 (iii) 脑肿瘤分割，这些任务在脑 MRI 研究中得到了积极研究。实验结果表明，我们的 Medical Transformer 优于最先进的迁移学习方法，有效地将分类和分类参数数量减少了约 92%

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Medical Transformer的新型迁移学习框架，用于3D MRI分析，通过高效建模3D体积图像并减少参数量来提升医疗图像分析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D医学图像分析方法依赖大量参数进行训练，且难以有效利用有限的标注数据，导致模型效率低下且泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 将3D体积图像转化为2D切片序列，采用多视角方法融合三个平面信息；通过自监督学习预训练模型，以掩码向量预测作为代理任务，实现参数高效的通用脑编码器。
AI.result: 在脑疾病诊断、脑龄预测和脑肿瘤分割三项任务中，Medical Transformer在参数量减少约92%的情况下优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Medical Transformer通过创新的架构设计和自监督预训练策略，显著提升了3D MRI分析的效率与性能，为医疗影像分析提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Medical Transformer: Universal Brain Encoder for 3D MRI Analysis Medical Transformer：用于 3D MRI 分析的通用脑编码器 Transfer learning has gained attention in medical image analysis due to limited annotated 3D medical datasets for training data-driven deep learning models in the real world. Existing 3D-based methods have transferred the pre-trained models to downstream tasks, which achieved promising results with only a small number of training samples. However, they demand a massive amount of parameters to train the model for 3D medical imaging. In this work, we propose a novel transfer learning framework, called Medical Transformer, that effectively models 3D volumetric images in the form of a sequence of 2D image slices. To make a high-level representation in 3D-form empowering spatial relations better, we take a multi-view approach that leverages plenty of information from the three planes of 3D volume, while providing parameter-efficient training. For building a source model generally applicable to various tasks, we pre-train the model in a self-supervised learning manner for masked encoding vector prediction as a proxy task, using a large-scale normal, healthy brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) dataset. Our pre-trained model is evaluated on three downstream tasks: (i) brain disease diagnosis, (ii) brain age prediction, and (iii) brain tumor segmentation, which are actively studied in brain MRI research. The experimental results show that our Medical Transformer outperforms the state-of-the-art transfer learning methods, efficiently reducing the number of parameters up to about 92% for classification and 由于现实世界中用于训练数据驱动的深度学习模型的带注释 3D 医学数据集有限，迁移学习在医学图像分析中受到了关注。现有的基于 3D 的方法已将预训练的模型转移到下游任务中，仅用少量的训练样本就取得了可喜的结果。然而，他们需要大量参数来训练 3D 医学成像模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，称为 Medical Transformer，它可以有效地以 2D 图像切片序列的形式对 3D 体积图像进行建模。为了更好地以 3D 形式进行高级表示，增强空间关系，我们采用多视图方法，利用来自 3D 体积三个平面的大量信息，同时提供参数高效的训练。为了构建普遍适用于各种任务的源模型，我们使用大规模正常、健康的大脑磁共振成像（MRI）数据集，以自监督学习的方式对模型进行预训练，以掩蔽编码向量预测作为代理任务。我们的预训练模型针对三个下游任务进行评估：(i) 脑疾病诊断、(ii) 脑年龄预测和 (iii) 脑肿瘤分割，这些任务在脑 MRI 研究中得到了积极研究。实验结果表明，我们的 Medical Transformer 优于最先进的迁移学习方法，有效地将分类和分类参数数量减少了约 92% 本文提出一种名为Medical Transformer的新型迁移学习框架，用于3D MRI分析，通过高效建模3D体积图像并减少参数量来提升医疗图像分析性能。 Eunji Jun,Seungwoo Jeong,Da-Woon Heo,Heung-Il Suk cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Lorenzo Rapetti,Yeshasvi Tirupachuri,Alberto Ranavolo,Tomohiro Kawakami,Takahide Yoshiike,Daniele Pucci
title: Shared Control of Robot-Robot Collaborative Lifting with Agent Postural and Force Ergonomic Optimization
title_zh: 具有智能体姿势和力工效优化的机器人-机器人协同举升的共享控制
abstract: Humans show specialized strategies for efficient collaboration. Transferring similar strategies to humanoid robots can improve their capability to interact with other agents, leading the way to complex collaborative scenarios with multiple agents acting on a shared environment. In this paper we present a control framework for robot-robot collaborative lifting. The proposed shared controller takes into account the joint action of both the robots thanks to a centralized controller that communicates with them, and solves the whole-system optimization. Efficient collaboration is ensured by taking into account the ergonomic requirements of the robots through the optimization of posture and contact forces. The framework is validated in an experimental scenario with two iCub humanoid robots performing different payload lifting sequences.

Transferring similar strategies to humanoid robots can improve their capability to interact with other agents, leading the way to complex collaborative scenarios with multiple agents acting on a shared environment. The framework is validated in an experimental scenario with two iCub humanoid robots performing different payload lifting sequences.
abstract_zh: 人类表现出高效协作的专门策略。将类似的策略转移到人形机器人上可以提高它们与其他智能体交互的能力，从而实现多个智能体在共享环境中运行的复杂协作场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器人与机器人协作提升的控制框架。所提出的共享控制器考虑了两个机器人的联合动作，这要归功于与它们通信的集中控制器，并解决了整个系统的优化问题。通过优化姿势和接触力，考虑机器人的人体工程学要求，确保高效协作。该框架在两个 iCub 人形机器人执行不同有效负载提升序列的实验场景中得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人协作搬运的共享控制框架，通过优化机器人姿态和接触力的符合人体工程学设计，实现高效协作。
AI.motivation: 人类在协作任务中展现出高效的策略，将类似策略应用于人形机器人可提升其多智能体交互能力，从而实现复杂协作场景。
AI.method: 设计集中式控制器协调多机器人动作，通过全局系统优化解决姿态和接触力的符合人体工程学问题。
AI.result: 在实验中，两个iCub机器人成功完成不同负载的搬运任务，验证了框架的有效性和符合人体工程学的优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂协作场景下的机器人交互提供了可行方案，有效提升了协作搬运的效率和安全性。

authors_text: Jakob Abeßer,Saichand Gourishetti,András Kátai,Tobias Clauß,Prachi Sharma,Judith Liebetrau
title: IDMT-Traffic: An Open Benchmark Dataset for Acoustic Traffic Monitoring Research
title_zh: IDMT-Traffic：用于声学交通监测研究的开放基准数据集
abstract: In many urban areas, traffic load and noise pollution are constantly increasing. Automated systems for traffic monitoring are promising countermeasures, which allow to systematically quantify and predict local traffic flow in order to to support municipal traffic planning decisions. In this paper, we present a novel open benchmark dataset, containing 2.5 hours of stereo audio recordings of 4718 vehicle passing events captured with both high-quality sE8 and medium-quality MEMS microphones. This dataset is well suited to evaluate the use-case of deploying audio classification algorithms to embedded sensor devices with restricted microphone quality and hardware processing power. In addition, this paper provides a detailed review of recent acoustic traffic monitoring (ATM) algorithms as well as the results of two benchmark experiments on vehicle type classification and direction of movement estimation using four state-of-the-art convolutional neural network architectures.
summary: In many urban areas, traffic load and noise pollution are constantly increasing. Automated systems for traffic monitoring are promising countermeasures, which allow to systematically quantify and predict local traffic flow in order to to support municipal traffic planning decisions. In this paper, we present a novel open benchmark dataset, containing 2.5 hours of stereo audio recordings of 4718 vehicle passing events captured with both high-quality sE8 and medium-quality MEMS microphones. This dataset is well suited to evaluate the use-case of deploying audio classification algorithms to embedded sensor devices with restricted microphone quality and hardware processing power. In addition, this paper provides a detailed review of recent acoustic traffic monitoring (ATM) algorithms as well as the results of two benchmark experiments on vehicle type classification and direction of movement estimation using four state-of-the-art convolutional neural network architectures.
abstract_zh: 在许多城市地区，交通负荷和噪音污染不断增加。交通监控自动化系统是有前途的对策，它可以系统地量化和预测当地交通流量，以支持城市交通规划决策。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的开放基准数据集，其中包含使用高质量 sE8 和中等质量 MEMS 麦克风捕获的 4718 个车辆通过事件的 2.5 小时立体声录音。该数据集非常适合评估将音频分类算法部署到麦克风质量和硬件处理能力有限的嵌入式传感器设备的用例。此外，本文还详细回顾了最新的声学交通监控（ATM）算法，以及使用四种最先进的卷积神经网络架构进行车辆类型分类和运动方向估计的两个基准实验的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源基准数据集IDMT-Traffic，用于评估声学交通监控算法在低质量麦克风和硬件限制下的性能，并综述相关算法并进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 城市交通负荷与噪声污染加剧，需自动化监控系统辅助决策，但现有研究缺乏适用于嵌入式设备低质量麦克风的基准数据集。
AI.method: 采集2.5小时双麦克风（高质量sE8与中等质量MEMS）交通声学数据，构建包含4718次车辆通过事件的数据集，并采用四种CNN架构进行车辆类型分类与运动方向估计的基准实验。
AI.result: 实验验证了四种先进CNN模型在车辆分类和方向估计任务中的性能，展示了数据集对评估低硬件条件下算法鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: IDMT-Traffic数据集为声学交通监控研究提供标准化基准，有助于开发适应嵌入式设备限制的音频分类算法，推动该领域技术发展。

In addition, this paper provides a detailed review of recent acoustic traffic monitoring (ATM) algorithms as well as the results of two benchmark experiments on vehicle type classification and direction of movement estimation using four state-of-the-art convolutional neural network architectures. 在许多城市地区，交通负荷和噪音污染不断增加。交通监控自动化系统是有前途的对策，它可以系统地量化和预测当地交通流量，以支持城市交通规划决策。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的开放基准数据集，其中包含使用高质量 sE8 和中等质量 MEMS 麦克风捕获的 4718 个车辆通过事件的 2.5 小时立体声录音。该数据集非常适合评估将音频分类算法部署到麦克风质量和硬件处理能力有限的嵌入式传感器设备的用例。此外，本文还详细回顾了最新的声学交通监控（ATM）算法，以及使用四种最先进的卷积神经网络架构进行车辆类型分类和运动方向估计的两个基准实验的结果。 本文提出一个开源基准数据集IDMT-Traffic，用于评估声学交通监控算法在低质量麦克风和硬件限制下的性能，并综述相关算法并进行基准测试。 Jakob Abeßer,Saichand Gourishetti,András Kátai,Tobias Clauß,Prachi Sharma,Judith Liebetrau eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD

authors_text: Alessandro Paolo Capasso,Paolo Maramotti,Anthony Dell'Eva,Alberto Broggi
title: End-to-End Intersection Handling using Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用多智能体深度强化学习的端到端交叉口处理
abstract: Navigating through intersections is one of the main challenging tasks for an autonomous vehicle. However, for the majority of intersections regulated by traffic lights, the problem could be solved by a simple rule-based method in which the autonomous vehicle behavior is closely related to the traffic light states. In this work, we focus on the implementation of a system able to navigate through intersections where only traffic signs are provided. We propose a multi-agent system using a continuous, model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning algorithm used to train a neural network for predicting both the acceleration and the steering angle at each time step. We demonstrate that agents learn both the basic rules needed to handle intersections by understanding the priorities of other learners inside the environment, and to drive safely along their paths. Moreover, a comparison between our system and a rule-based method proves that our model achieves better results especially with dense traffic conditions. Finally, we test our system on real world scenarios using real recorded traffic data, proving that our module is able to generalize both to unseen environments and to different traffic conditions.

abstract_zh: 穿过十字路口是自动驾驶车辆面临的主要挑战性任务之一。然而，对于大多数由红绿灯控制的十字路口，问题可以通过简单的基于规则的方法来解决，其中自动驾驶车辆的行为与红绿灯状态密切相关。在这项工作中，我们专注于实现一个能够在仅提供交通标志的十字路口导航的系统。我们提出了一种多智能体系统，使用连续的、无模型的深度强化学习算法来训练神经网络，以预测每个时间步的加速度和转向角。我们证明，智能体通过了解环境中其他学习者的优先级来学习处理交叉路口所需的基本规则，并沿着他们的路径安全驾驶。此外，我们的系统与基于规则的方法之间的比较证明，我们的模型取得了更好的结果，特别是在密集的交通条件下。最后，我们使用真实记录的流量数据在现实场景中测试我们的系统，证明我们的模块能够泛化到未见过的环境和不同的交通条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体深度强化学习的端到端系统，用于解决仅有交通标志的交叉路口自动驾驶导航问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于交通灯的规则方法难以应对仅依赖交通标志的复杂交叉路口场景，尤其在高密度交通环境下存在明显局限性。
AI.method: 采用连续无模型深度强化学习算法，构建多智能体系统训练神经网络，实时预测车辆加速度和转向角，通过环境交互学习优先级规则和安全路径规划。
AI.result: 在密集交通场景下优于传统规则方法，真实交通数据测试验证了模型对未知环境和不同交通条件的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体深度强化学习有效解决了复杂交通标志场景下的交叉路口导航问题，为自动驾驶提供了更适应实际道路环境的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhuoyun Li,Changhong Zhong,Sijia Liu,Ruixuan Wang,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: Preserving Earlier Knowledge in Continual Learning with the Help of All Previous Feature Extractors
title_zh: 在所有以前的特征提取器的帮助下保留持续学习中的早期知识
abstract: Continual learning of new knowledge over time is one desirable capability for intelligent systems to recognize more and more classes of objects. Without or with very limited amount of old data stored, an intelligent system often catastrophically forgets previously learned old knowledge when learning new knowledge. Recently, various approaches have been proposed to alleviate the catastrophic forgetting issue. However, old knowledge learned earlier is commonly less preserved than that learned more recently. In order to reduce the forgetting of particularly earlier learned old knowledge and improve the overall continual learning performance, we propose a simple yet effective fusion mechanism by including all the previously learned feature extractors into the intelligent model. In addition, a new feature extractor is included to the model when learning a new set of classes each time, and a feature extractor pruning is also applied to prevent the whole model size from growing rapidly. Experiments on multiple classification tasks show that the proposed approach can effectively reduce the forgetting of old knowledge, achieving state-of-the-art continual learning performance.
summary: Continual learning of new knowledge over time is one desirable capability for intelligent systems to recognize more and more classes of objects. Without or with very limited amount of old data stored, an intelligent system often catastrophically forgets previously learned old knowledge when learning new knowledge. Recently, various approaches have been proposed to alleviate the catastrophic forgetting issue. However, old knowledge learned earlier is commonly less preserved than that learned more recently. In order to reduce the forgetting of particularly earlier learned old knowledge and improve the overall continual learning performance, we propose a simple yet effective fusion mechanism by including all the previously learned feature extractors into the intelligent model. In addition, a new feature extractor is included to the model when learning a new set of classes each time, and a feature extractor pruning is also applied to prevent the whole model size from growing rapidly. Experiments on multiple classification tasks show that the proposed approach can effectively reduce the forgetting of old knowledge, achieving state-of-the-art continual learning performance.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移不断学习新知识是智能系统识别越来越多类别物体的理想能力。无论是否存储了非常有限的旧数据，智能系统在学习新知识时常常会灾难性地忘记以前学到的旧知识。最近，已经提出了各种方法来缓解灾难性遗忘问题。然而，较早学到的旧知识通常比最近学到的知识保存得更少。为了减少特别是早期学习的旧知识的遗忘并提高整体持续学习性能，我们提出了一种简单而有效的融合机制，将所有先前学习的特征提取器包含到智能模型中。此外，每次学习一组新的类时，模型中都会包含一个新的特征提取器，并且还应用特征提取器剪枝以防止整个模型大小快速增长。多个分类任务的实验表明，所提出的方法可以有效减少旧知识的遗忘，实现最先进的持续学习性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合机制，在持续学习中利用所有先前特征提取器以保留早期知识，提升整体性能
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在保留早期知识方面效果有限，导致学习新知识时旧知识被严重遗忘，需改进以提升整体性能

AI.result: 实验表明方法有效减少旧知识遗忘，达到持续学习最先进性能
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决早期知识保留问题，提升持续学习的整体性能，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Qin Wang,Dengxin Dai,Lukas Hoyer,Luc Van Gool,Olga Fink
title: Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation with Self-Supervised Depth Estimation
title_zh: 具有自监督深度估计的领域自适应语义分割
abstract: Domain adaptation for semantic segmentation aims to improve the model performance in the presence of a distribution shift between source and target domain. Leveraging the supervision from auxiliary tasks~(such as depth estimation) has the potential to heal this shift because many visual tasks are closely related to each other. However, such a supervision is not always available. In this work, we leverage the guidance from self-supervised depth estimation, which is available on both domains, to bridge the domain gap. On the one hand, we propose to explicitly learn the task feature correlation to strengthen the target semantic predictions with the help of target depth estimation. On the other hand, we use the depth prediction discrepancy from source and target depth decoders to approximate the pixel-wise adaptation difficulty. The adaptation difficulty, inferred from depth, is then used to refine the target semantic segmentation pseudo-labels. The proposed method can be easily implemented into existing segmentation frameworks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on the benchmark tasks SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA-to-Cityscapes, on which we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance of $55.0\%$ and $56.6\%$, respectively. Our code is available at \url{https://qin.ee/corda}.
summary: Domain adaptation for semantic segmentation aims to improve the model performance in the presence of a distribution shift between source and target domain. Leveraging the supervision from auxiliary tasks~(such as depth estimation) has the potential to heal this shift because many visual tasks are closely related to each other. However, such a supervision is not always available. In this work, we leverage the guidance from self-supervised depth estimation, which is available on both domains, to bridge the domain gap. On the one hand, we propose to explicitly learn the task feature correlation to strengthen the target semantic predictions with the help of target depth estimation. On the other hand, we use the depth prediction discrepancy from source and target depth decoders to approximate the pixel-wise adaptation difficulty. The adaptation difficulty, inferred from depth, is then used to refine the target semantic segmentation pseudo-labels. The proposed method can be easily implemented into existing segmentation frameworks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on the benchmark tasks SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA-to-Cityscapes, on which we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance of $55.0\%$ and $56.6\%$, respectively. Our code is available at \url{https://qin.ee/corda}.
abstract_zh: 语义分割的域适应旨在在源域和目标域之间存在分布变化的情况下提高模型性能。利用辅助任务（例如深度估计）的监督有可能治愈这种转变，因为许多视觉任务彼此密切相关。然而，这种监督并不总是有效。在这项工作中，我们利用两个领域都可用的自监督深度估计的指导来弥合领域差距。一方面，我们建议在目标深度估计的帮助下显式学习任务特征相关性以加强目标语义预测。另一方面，我们使用源深度解码器和目标深度解码器的深度预测差异来近似像素级适应难度。然后使用从深度推断的适应难度来细化目标语义分割伪标签。所提出的方法可以很容易地实现到现有的分割框架中。我们在基准任务 SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes 和 GTA-to-Cityscapes 上展示了我们的方法的有效性，在这些任务上我们分别实现了 $55.0\%$ 和 $56.6\%$ 的新的最先进性能。我们的代码可在 \url{https://qin.ee/corda} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督深度估计的领域自适应语义分割方法，以解决源域和目标域分布差异导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 领域自适应语义分割面临源域与目标域分布差异的挑战，传统辅助任务监督（如深度估计）在目标域中常不可用，而自监督深度估计可跨领域提供一致指导。
AI.method: 通过显式学习任务特征相关性，利用目标域自监督深度估计增强语义预测；同时基于源域与目标域深度预测差异推断像素级适应难度，优化目标域伪标签。
AI.result: 在SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes和GTA-to-Cityscapes基准测试中分别达到55.0%和56.6%的性能，刷新当时最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 自监督深度估计有效弥合领域鸿沟，无需额外标注即可提升语义分割适应性，方法易集成现有框架且具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation with Self-Supervised Depth Estimation 具有自监督深度估计的领域自适应语义分割 Domain adaptation for semantic segmentation aims to improve the model performance in the presence of a distribution shift between source and target domain. Leveraging the supervision from auxiliary tasks~(such as depth estimation) has the potential to heal this shift because many visual tasks are closely related to each other. However, such a supervision is not always available. In this work, we leverage the guidance from self-supervised depth estimation, which is available on both domains, to bridge the domain gap. On the one hand, we propose to explicitly learn the task feature correlation to strengthen the target semantic predictions with the help of target depth estimation. On the other hand, we use the depth prediction discrepancy from source and target depth decoders to approximate the pixel-wise adaptation difficulty. The adaptation difficulty, inferred from depth, is then used to refine the target semantic segmentation pseudo-labels. The proposed method can be easily implemented into existing segmentation frameworks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on the benchmark tasks SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA-to-Cityscapes, on which we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance of $55.0\%$ and $56.6\%$, respectively. title: DeRenderNet: Intrinsic Image Decomposition of Urban Scenes with Shape-(In)dependent Shading Rendering
title_zh: DeRenderNet：使用形状（独立）相关的着色渲染对城市场景进行本质图像分解
abstract: We propose DeRenderNet, a deep neural network to decompose the albedo and latent lighting, and render shape-(in)dependent shadings, given a single image of an outdoor urban scene, trained in a self-supervised manner. To achieve this goal, we propose to use the albedo maps extracted from scenes in videogames as direct supervision and pre-compute the normal and shadow prior maps based on the depth maps provided as indirect supervision. Compared with state-of-the-art intrinsic image decomposition methods, DeRenderNet produces shadow-free albedo maps with clean details and an accurate prediction of shadows in the shape-independent shading, which is shown to be effective in re-rendering and improving the accuracy of high-level vision tasks for urban scenes.
summary: We propose DeRenderNet, a deep neural network to decompose the albedo and latent lighting, and render shape-(in)dependent shadings, given a single image of an outdoor urban scene, trained in a self-supervised manner. To achieve this goal, we propose to use the albedo maps extracted from scenes in videogames as direct supervision and pre-compute the normal and shadow prior maps based on the depth maps provided as indirect supervision. Compared with state-of-the-art intrinsic image decomposition methods, DeRenderNet produces shadow-free albedo maps with clean details and an accurate prediction of shadows in the shape-independent shading, which is shown to be effective in re-rendering and improving the accuracy of high-level vision tasks for urban scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeRenderNet，这是一种深度神经网络，用于分解反照率和潜在光照，并渲染与形状相关的阴影，给定室外城市场景的单个图像，并以自我监督的方式进行训练。为了实现这一目标，我们建议使用从视频游戏场景中提取的反照率图作为直接监督，并根据作为间接监督提供的深度图预先计算法线和阴影先验图。与最先进的本征图像分解方法相比，DeRenderNet 生成具有清晰细节的无阴影反照率图，并在与形状无关的阴影中准确预测阴影，这被证明可以有效地重新渲染并提高城市场景的高级视觉任务的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeRenderNet，一种通过自监督学习分解城市场景内在图像的深度神经网络，可分离反照率与阴影信息并渲染形状相关/无关的阴影。
AI.motivation: 现有内在图像分解方法难以准确分离复杂城市场景中的阴影与反照率，且依赖人工标注数据。利用游戏场景生成的高质量反照率图作为监督信号可提升分解效果。
AI.method: 以游戏场景反照率图作为直接监督，结合深度图生成法线图和阴影先验图作为间接监督，通过自监督学习训练网络分解输入图像的反照率与形状无关阴影。
AI.result: 生成的反照率图无阴影干扰且细节清晰，形状无关阴影预测准确，显著提升城市场景重渲染效果及高层视觉任务精度。
AI.conclusion: DeRenderNet通过结合游戏数据与深度先验，实现了优于现有方法的城市场景内在图像分解，为阴影分离与视觉任务优化提供了有效解决方案。

title: Development of global optimal coverage control using multiple aerial robots
title_zh: 多空中机器人全局最优覆盖控制的开发
abstract: Coverage control has been widely used for constructing mobile sensor network such as for environmental monitoring, and one of the most commonly used methods is the Lloyd algorithm based on Voronoi partitions. However, when this method is used, the result sometimes converges to a local optimum. To overcome this problem, game theoretic coverage control has been proposed and found to be capable of stochastically deriving the optimal deployment. From a practical point of view, however, it is necessary to make the result converge to the global optimum deterministically. In this paper, we propose a global optimal coverage control along with collision avoidance in continuous space that ensures multiple sensors can deterministically and smoothly move to the global optimal deployment. This approach consists of a cut-in algorithm based on neighborhood importance of measurement and a modified potential method for collision avoidance. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm has been confirmed through numerous simulations and some experiments using multiple aerial robots.
summary: Coverage control has been widely used for constructing mobile sensor network such as for environmental monitoring, and one of the most commonly used methods is the Lloyd algorithm based on Voronoi partitions. However, when this method is used, the result sometimes converges to a local optimum. To overcome this problem, game theoretic coverage control has been proposed and found to be capable of stochastically deriving the optimal deployment. From a practical point of view, however, it is necessary to make the result converge to the global optimum deterministically. In this paper, we propose a global optimal coverage control along with collision avoidance in continuous space that ensures multiple sensors can deterministically and smoothly move to the global optimal deployment. This approach consists of a cut-in algorithm based on neighborhood importance of measurement and a modified potential method for collision avoidance. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm has been confirmed through numerous simulations and some experiments using multiple aerial robots.
abstract_zh: 覆盖控制已广泛用于构建环境监测等移动传感器网络，最常用的方法之一是基于Voronoi分区的Lloyd算法。然而，当使用这种方法时，结果有时会收敛到局部最优。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了博弈论覆盖控制，并发现它能够随机导出最佳部署。但从实际的角度来看，有必要使结果确定性地收敛到全局最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种全局最优覆盖控制以及连续空间中的碰撞避免，以确保多个传感器可以确定性地、平滑地移动到全局最优部署。该方法由基于邻域测量重要性的切入算法和改进的避免碰撞的潜在方法组成。通过大量模拟和使用多个空中机器人的实验证实了所提出算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确保多架空中机器人确定性收敛到全局最优部署的覆盖控制方法。
AI.motivation: 传统覆盖控制方法（如Lloyd算法）易陷入局部最优，而博弈论方法虽能随机获得最优部署，但实际应用需确定性收敛到全局最优。
AI.method: 结合基于测量邻域重要性的切入算法与改进势场法实现避障的全局最优覆盖控制。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真及多架空中机器人实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可使多传感器系统确定性、平滑地达到全局最优部署，优于现有方法。

search_text: Development of global optimal coverage control using multiple aerial robots 多空中机器人全局最优覆盖控制的开发 Coverage control has been widely used for constructing mobile sensor network such as for environmental monitoring, and one of the most commonly used methods is the Lloyd algorithm based on Voronoi partitions. However, when this method is used, the result sometimes converges to a local optimum. To overcome this problem, game theoretic coverage control has been proposed and found to be capable of stochastically deriving the optimal deployment. From a practical point of view, however, it is necessary to make the result converge to the global optimum deterministically. In this paper, we propose a global optimal coverage control along with collision avoidance in continuous space that ensures multiple sensors can deterministically and smoothly move to the global optimal deployment. This approach consists of a cut-in algorithm based on neighborhood importance of measurement and a modified potential method for collision avoidance. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm has been confirmed through numerous simulations and some experiments using multiple aerial robots. 覆盖控制已广泛用于构建环境监测等移动传感器网络，最常用的方法之一是基于Voronoi分区的Lloyd算法。然而，当使用这种方法时，结果有时会收敛到局部最优。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了博弈论覆盖控制，并发现它能够随机导出最佳部署。但从实际的角度来看，有必要使结果确定性地收敛到全局最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种全局最优覆盖控制以及连续空间中的碰撞避免，以确保多个传感器可以确定性地、平滑地移动到全局最优部署。该方法由基于邻域测量重要性的切入算法和改进的避免碰撞的潜在方法组成。通过大量模拟和使用多个空中机器人的实验证实了所提出算法的有效性。 本文提出了一种确保多架空中机器人确定性收敛到全局最优部署的覆盖控制方法。 Kazuki Shibata,Tatsuya Miyano,Tomohiko Jimbo cs.RO

authors_text: Haodong Duan,Yue Zhao,Kai Chen,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai
title: Revisiting Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 重新审视基于骨架的动作识别
abstract: Human skeleton, as a compact representation of human action, has received increasing attention in recent years. Many skeleton-based action recognition methods adopt graph convolutional networks (GCN) to extract features on top of human skeletons. Despite the positive results shown in previous works, GCN-based methods are subject to limitations in robustness, interoperability, and scalability. In this work, we propose PoseC3D, a new approach to skeleton-based action recognition, which relies on a 3D heatmap stack instead of a graph sequence as the base representation of human skeletons. Compared to GCN-based methods, PoseC3D is more effective in learning spatiotemporal features, more robust against pose estimation noises, and generalizes better in cross-dataset settings. Also, PoseC3D can handle multiple-person scenarios without additional computation cost, and its features can be easily integrated with other modalities at early fusion stages, which provides a great design space to further boost the performance. On four challenging datasets, PoseC3D consistently obtains superior performance, when used alone on skeletons and in combination with the RGB modality.
summary: Human skeleton, as a compact representation of human action, has received increasing attention in recent years. Many skeleton-based action recognition methods adopt graph convolutional networks (GCN) to extract features on top of human skeletons. Despite the positive results shown in previous works, GCN-based methods are subject to limitations in robustness, interoperability, and scalability. In this work, we propose PoseC3D, a new approach to skeleton-based action recognition, which relies on a 3D heatmap stack instead of a graph sequence as the base representation of human skeletons. Compared to GCN-based methods, PoseC3D is more effective in learning spatiotemporal features, more robust against pose estimation noises, and generalizes better in cross-dataset settings. Also, PoseC3D can handle multiple-person scenarios without additional computation cost, and its features can be easily integrated with other modalities at early fusion stages, which provides a great design space to further boost the performance. On four challenging datasets, PoseC3D consistently obtains superior performance, when used alone on skeletons and in combination with the RGB modality.
abstract_zh: 人体骨骼作为人类行为的紧凑表征，近年来受到越来越多的关注。许多基于骨架的动作识别方法采用图卷积网络（GCN）来提取人体骨架上的特征。尽管之前的工作取得了积极的成果，但基于 GCN 的方法在鲁棒性、互操作性和可扩展性方面仍受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PoseC3D，一种基于骨架的动作识别的新方法，它依赖 3D 热图堆栈而不是图形序列作为人体骨骼的基本表示。与基于 GCN 的方法相比，PoseC3D 在学习时空特征方面更有效，对姿态估计噪声更鲁棒，并且在跨数据集设置中具有更好的泛化能力。此外，PoseC3D可以处理多人场景，无需额外的计算成本，并且其功能可以在早期融合阶段轻松地与其他模式集成，这为进一步提升性能提供了巨大的设计空间。在四个具有挑战性的数据集上，单独用于骨骼以及与 RGB 模态结合使用时，PoseC3D 始终获得卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨骼的动作识别新方法PoseC3D，通过3D热图堆栈替代传统图卷积网络（GCN）以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GCN的骨骼动作识别方法在鲁棒性、跨数据集泛化能力和多目标处理上存在局限，需寻找更优的表示方式。
AI.method: 采用3D热图堆栈作为骨骼基础表示，替代图序列；支持多目标场景处理，且能早期融合其他模态（如RGB）特征。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的数据集上，PoseC3D单独使用或与RGB结合时均取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: PoseC3D在骨骼动作识别中表现出更强的时空特征学习能力，为多模态融合提供了更灵活的设计空间。

authors_text: Sunnie S. Y. Kim,Sharon Zhang,Nicole Meister,Olga Russakovsky
title: [Re] Don't Judge an Object by Its Context: Learning to Overcome Contextual Bias
title_zh: [回复]不要根据上下文来判断对象：学习克服上下文偏见
comment: ML Reproducibility Challenge 2020. Accepted for publication in the ReScience C journal
comments: ML Reproducibility Challenge 2020. Accepted for publication in the ReScience C journal
abstract: Singh et al. (2020) point out the dangers of contextual bias in visual recognition datasets. They propose two methods, CAM-based and feature-split, that better recognize an object or attribute in the absence of its typical context while maintaining competitive within-context accuracy. To verify their performance, we attempted to reproduce all 12 tables in the original paper, including those in the appendix. We also conducted additional experiments to better understand the proposed methods, including increasing the regularization in CAM-based and removing the weighted loss in feature-split. As the original code was not made available, we implemented the entire pipeline from scratch in PyTorch 1.7.0. Our implementation is based on the paper and email exchanges with the authors. We found that both proposed methods in the original paper help mitigate contextual bias, although for some methods, we could not completely replicate the quantitative results in the paper even after completing an extensive hyperparameter search. For example, on COCO-Stuff, DeepFashion, and UnRel, our feature-split model achieved an increase in accuracy on out-of-context images over the standard baseline, whereas on AwA, we saw a drop in performance. For the proposed CAM-based method, we were able to reproduce the original paper's results to within 0.5$\%$ mAP. Our implementation can be found at https://github.com/princetonvisualai/ContextualBias.

abstract_zh: 辛格等人。 (2020) 指出视觉识别数据集中上下文偏差的危险。他们提出了两种方法，基于 CAM 和特征分割，可以在缺乏典型上下文的情况下更好地识别对象或属性，同时保持具有竞争力的上下文准确性。为了验证它们的性能，我们尝试重现原始论文中的所有 12 个表格，包括附录中的表格。我们还进行了额外的实验，以更好地理解所提出的方法，包括增加基于 CAM 的正则化和消除特征分割中的加权损失。由于原始代码不可用，我们在 PyTorch 1.7.0 中从头开始实现了整个管道。我们的实施基于与作者的论文和电子邮件交流。我们发现原始论文中提出的两种方法都有助于减轻上下文偏差，尽管对于某些方法，即使在完成广泛的超参数搜索后，我们也无法完全复制论文中的定量结果。例如，在 COCO-Stuff、DeepFashion 和 UnRel 上，我们的特征分割模型在脱离上下文的图像上的准确性比标准基线有所提高，而在 AwA 上，我们看到性能下降。对于所提出的基于 CAM 的方法，我们能够在 0.5$\%$ mAP 范围内重现原始论文的结果。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/princetonvisualai/ContextualBias 找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在复现并验证Singh等人提出的两种克服视觉识别数据集中上下文偏差的方法，并通过额外实验深入分析其效果。
AI.motivation: 为验证Singh等人提出的上下文偏差缓解方法的有效性，并探索其在不同场景下的表现差异。
AI.method: 从零开始使用PyTorch实现原始方法（CAM-based和feature-split），并进行额外实验（如增强CAM正则化、移除feature-split的加权损失），通过广泛超参数搜索优化结果。
AI.result: 部分复现原始结果，feature-split在COCO-Stuff等数据集上提升无上下文图像准确率但在AwA数据集表现下降，CAM-based方法mAP误差控制在0.5%以内。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法均能缓解上下文偏差，但完全复现原始定量结果存在挑战，需进一步研究方法鲁棒性与数据集特异性影响。

title: Deep Domain Generalization with Feature-norm Network
title_zh: 具有特征规范网络的深域泛化
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of training with multiple source domains with the aim to generalize to new domains at test time without an adaptation step. This is known as domain generalization (DG). Previous works on DG assume identical categories or label space across the source domains. In the case of category shift among the source domains, previous methods on DG are vulnerable to negative transfer due to the large mismatch among label spaces, decreasing the target classification accuracy. To tackle the aforementioned problem, we introduce an end-to-end feature-norm network (FNN) which is robust to negative transfer as it does not need to match the feature distribution among the source domains. We also introduce a collaborative feature-norm network (CFNN) to further improve the generalization capability of FNN. The CFNN matches the predictions of the next most likely categories for each training sample which increases each network's posterior entropy. We apply the proposed FNN and CFNN networks to the problem of DG for image classification tasks and demonstrate significant improvement over the state-of-the-art.

This is known as domain generalization (DG). Previous works on DG assume identical categories or label space across the source domains. In the case of category shift among the source domains, previous methods on DG are vulnerable to negative transfer due to the large mismatch among label spaces, decreasing the target classification accuracy. To tackle the aforementioned problem, we introduce an end-to-end feature-norm network (FNN) which is robust to negative transfer as it does not need to match the feature distribution among the source domains. We also introduce a collaborative feature-norm network (CFNN) to further improve the generalization capability of FNN. The CFNN matches the predictions of the next most likely categories for each training sample which increases each network's posterior entropy. We apply the proposed FNN and CFNN networks to the problem of DG for image classification tasks and demonstrate significant improvement over the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了使用多个源域进行训练的问题，目的是在测试时泛化到新域，而无需适应步骤。这称为域泛化 (DG)。之前的 DG 工作假设源域中具有相同的类别或标签空间。在源域之间发生类别转移的情况下，由于标签空间之间存在较大的不匹配，先前的DG方法很容易受到负迁移的影响，从而降低目标分类的准确性。为了解决上述问题，我们引入了一种端到端特征规范网络（FNN），它对负迁移具有鲁棒性，因为它不需要匹配源域之间的特征分布。我们还引入了协作特征规范网络（CFNN）来进一步提高 FNN 的泛化能力。 CFNN 匹配每个训练样本的下一个最可能类别的预测，这增加了每个网络的后验熵。我们将所提出的 FNN 和 CFNN 网络应用于图像分类任务的 DG 问题，并展示了相对于现有技术的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出特征范数网络（FNN）和协作特征范数网络（CFNN），解决领域泛化中类别转移导致的负迁移问题，提升模型在新领域的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统领域泛化方法在源域存在类别转移时易因标签空间不匹配产生负迁移，导致目标域分类性能下降。
AI.method: 设计FNN通过特征范数约束降低域间分布差异，提出CFNN通过匹配样本次优类别预测增加模型后验熵，提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中，FNN和CFNN相比现有方法取得显著性能提升，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征范数约束和协作预测机制，有效缓解了类别转移场景下的领域泛化难题。

authors_text: Youngtaek Kim,Hyeon Jeon,Kiroong Choe,Hyunjoo Song,Bohyoung Kim,Jinwook Seo
title: Interactive Visualization for Exploring Information Fragments in Software Repositories
title_zh: 用于探索软件存储库中信息片段的交互式可视化
abstract: Software developers explore and inspect software repository data to obtain detailed information archived in the development history. However, developers who are not acquainted with the development context suffer from delving into the repositories with a handful of information; they have difficulty discovering and expanding information fragments considering the topological and sequential multi-dimensional structure of repositories. We introduce ExIF, an interactive visualization for exploring information fragments in software repositories. ExIF helps users discover new information fragments within clusters or topological neighbors and identify revisions incorporating user-collected fragments.
summary: Software developers explore and inspect software repository data to obtain detailed information archived in the development history. However, developers who are not acquainted with the development context suffer from delving into the repositories with a handful of information; they have difficulty discovering and expanding information fragments considering the topological and sequential multi-dimensional structure of repositories. We introduce ExIF, an interactive visualization for exploring information fragments in software repositories. ExIF helps users discover new information fragments within clusters or topological neighbors and identify revisions incorporating user-collected fragments.
abstract_zh: 软件开发人员探索和检查软件存储库数据，以获得开发历史记录中存档的详细信息。然而，不熟悉开发环境的开发人员会因为使用少量信息而深入研究存储库；考虑到存储库的拓扑和顺序多维结构，他们很难发现和扩展信息片段。我们引入了 ExIF，一种交互式可视化，用于探索软件存储库中的信息片段。 ExIF 帮助用户发现集群或拓扑邻居内的新信息片段，并识别包含用户收集的片段的修订。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExIF，一种交互式可视化工具，用于帮助软件开发者探索和扩展软件仓库中的信息碎片。
AI.motivation: 开发者在缺乏开发背景知识时，难以从软件仓库的拓扑和时序多维结构中发现并扩展信息碎片。
AI.method: 设计ExIF工具，通过交互式可视化技术使用户能够发现集群或拓扑邻域中的新信息碎片，并识别包含用户收集片段的修订版本。
AI.result: ExIF有效辅助用户发现隐藏的信息碎片，并准确识别相关修订版本。
AI.conclusion: ExIF为软件仓库的信息碎片探索提供了直观高效的可视化解决方案。
